name: @u1f992/pdfdiff
description: Visualize and quantify differences between two PDF files.

scripts.test:cli: node src/cli.js test/a.pdf test/b.pdf out --mask test/mask.pdf --dpi 300 && echo "expected: Page 1, Addition: 7500, Deletion: 7500, Modification: 7500"
scripts.build:wasm: docker run --rm --volume .:/workdir --workdir /workdir --user root --entrypoint bash emscripten/emsdk:5.0.7 scripts/build-wasm.sh
scripts.format:wasm: docker run --rm --volume .:/workdir --workdir /workdir --user root --entrypoint bash emscripten/emsdk:5.0.7 scripts/build-wasm.sh format
scripts.tidy:wasm: docker run --rm --volume .:/workdir --workdir /workdir --user root --entrypoint bash emscripten/emsdk:5.0.7 scripts/build-wasm.sh tidy
scripts.clean:wasm: docker run --rm --volume .:/workdir --workdir /workdir --user root --entrypoint bash emscripten/emsdk:5.0.7 scripts/build-wasm.sh clean
scripts.build: npm run build:wasm && npm run build:version && rollup -c

author: Koutaro Mukai
